'''Zhat Lah''' was a relative of [[Tsavong Lah]] and a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. He retreated his forces from the [[battle at Fondor]] in the face of an attack launched by overwhelming [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|forces]], an unusual action for Yuuzhan Vong warriors, who typically fought to the [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="tfp" /> [[Nas Choka]], the [[warmaster]] who had replaced Tsavong Lah,<ref name="fh1">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref> praised Zhat Lah for his actions and placed the surprised commander in charge of a defense [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] at [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], the Yuuzhan Vong capital.<ref name="tfp" />
